title: [SV] Fix circt-doc documentation generation for SV passes
body:
The filename is SVPasses.td not Passes.td, which is causing the `circt-doc` target to fail.

Initial issue reported by @xgupta [here](https://github.com/llvm/circt/commit/da80538e9f845d62ec3b2a6b7695926b93906e87#commitcomment-46730180).
